milestones.detail:
Go / No-Go confirmed
- Closed to go with Affinity and Klickly
milestones.notes:
Decision 6/5 - 
Recommend moving ahead ASAP with Affinity and Klickly for Track 1 propensity activation, with Experian as a strategic fallback pending receipt and validation of a usable data file. Experian remains strong in the framework, but Affinity and Klickly are further along commercially and technically, and we have already completed EDAs on both data sets.

For Track 2 model training, recommend deferring a final partner decision until we prove value via Track 1 + complete diligence on ML training architecture (Snowflake DCR or Internal).
